title: clematis barbellata var. barbellata
intro: Clematis barbellata var. barbellata, also known as Himalayan Clematis or Mountain Clematis, is a flowering plant species in the Clematis genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. Herbal preparations of Clematis barbellata var. barbellata include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and internally to address various health issues.
